name: magic-style-transfer
description: Restyle an image with the style of another one. I strongly suggest to upscale the results with Clarity AI

apply_watermark.description: Applies a watermark to enable determining if an image is generated in downstream applications. If you have other provisions for generating or deploying images safely, you can use this to disable watermarking.
apply_watermark.title: Apply Watermark

background_color.description: When passing an image with alpha channel, it will be replaced with this color
background_color.title: Background Color

condition_canny_scale.description: The bigger this number is, the more ControlNet interferes
condition_canny_scale.title: Condition Canny Scale

condition_depth_scale.description: The bigger this number is, the more ControlNet interferes
condition_depth_scale.title: Condition Depth Scale

ip_image.description: Input image for img2img or inpaint mode
ip_image.title: Ip Image

lora_scale.description: LoRA additive scale. Only applicable on trained models.
lora_scale.title: Lora Scale

lora_weights.description: Replicate LoRA weights to use. Leave blank to use the default weights.
lora_weights.title: Lora Weights

prompt.default: An astronaut riding a rainbow unicorn
prompt.title: Prompt

resizing_scale.description: If you want the image to have a solid margin. Scale of the solid margin. 1.0 means no resizing.
resizing_scale.title: Resizing Scale

seed.description: Random seed. Leave blank to randomize the seed
seed.title: Seed

strength.description: When img2img is active, the denoising strength. 1 means total destruction of the input image.
strength.title: Strength
